# PlayOrbs Documentation

> Decentralized Battle Royale powered by Solana & ICP

PlayOrbs is a provably fair battle royale gaming platform. Players pay SOL entry fees to compete in physics-based rounds, with winners receiving SOL prizes and PORB token emissions.

## Key Facts

- Built on Solana (execution) and Internet Computer/ICP (randomness)
- 100% fair launch - no pre-mine, no team allocation, no VC
- PORB token backed by real game fees with locked liquidity
- Cryptographically verified outcomes via ICP threshold signatures

- [One Pager](/intro/one-pager): Quick overview of PlayOrbs
- [What is PlayOrbs](/): Introduction and value proposition
- [How It Works](/intro/how-it-works): Game flow from entry to rewards
- [Getting Started](/gameplay/getting-started): Set up wallet and play
- [Round Mechanics](/gameplay/round-mechanics): Round states and transitions
- [Tier System](/gameplay/tier-system): Entry fees and player limits
- [Seasons](/gameplay/seasons): Season structure and rewards
- [Points System](/earning/points-system): How points are calculated
- [PORB Emissions](/earning/porb-emissions): Token reward mechanics
- [Leaderboards](/earning/leaderboards): Ranking system
- [Referral Program](/earning/referral-program): Earn from referrals
- [PORB Token](/tokenomics/orb-token): Token specification and utility
- [Supply Mechanics](/tokenomics/supply-mechanics): Token distribution
- [Genesis Bootstrap](/tokenomics/genesis-bootstrap): Initial liquidity creation
- [Epoch Decay](/tokenomics/epoch-decay): Emission schedule
- [Liquidity Management](/tokenomics/liquidity-management): LP operations
- [Economic Sustainability](/tokenomics/economic-sustainability): Long-term viability
- [Architecture Overview](/technical/architecture-overview): System design
- [Randomness Overview](/randomness/overview): ICP integration for fairness
- [Physics Engine](/physics/engine-overview): Deterministic game engine
- [Fee Distribution](/economics/fee-distribution): How fees flow
- [Glossary](/reference/glossary): Terminology reference
